name: twork/phy-faq-item
title: FAQ Item
description: Single FAQ item (question + answer) for the Physio FAQ section.

question.default: Do I need a doctor's referral?

answer.default: While a referral is helpful, you can also book a direct consultation with our physiotherapists for assessment.
